speaker: cat
text: toji suno na… suno na… Spring Boot kya hota hai? bataoo na please…

speaker: toji
text: Spring Boot ek framework hai chhote… Java me applications banana fast aur simple bana deta hai.

speaker: cat
text: simple simple matlab… mujhe zyada code nahi likhna padega?

speaker: toji
text: haan. Pehle Java me bahut configuration karni padti thi… Spring Boot bolta hai tum bas logic likho, baaki main handle kar lunga.

speaker: cat
text: ohhh… matlab helper jaisa? jaise tum meri help karte ho?

speaker: toji
text: bilkul. Spring Boot ek silent helper jaisa hai developers ke liye.

speaker: cat
text: toji… ek aur puchu? puchu na?

speaker: cat
text: sab log bolte hain API banao API banao… Spring Boot me API kaise banta hai?

speaker: toji
text: Spring Boot me tum ek controller banate ho aur ek endpoint define karte ho, jaise /hello.

speaker: toji
text: haan. Internet se koi us darwaze par knock kare… tumhara code response de deta hai.

speaker: cat
text: ohhh… matlab user knock kare… aur Spring Boot bole 'andar aao'?

speaker: toji
text: exactly. Aur phir tum decide karte ho user ko kya data bhejna hai.

speaker: cat
text: ohhh… ab samajh aa gaya… thoda thoda… main smart ho rahi hu na?

speaker: toji
text: hm… tum already smart ho chhote.
